Video.summary: Surfing demands self-involvement, far beyond the ego games man plays with himself with commercial images.
Video.title: Join the Dance - Transformative Film Meditation

Image.alt: Join the Dance - Transformative Film Meditation
Join the Dance - Transformative Film Meditation

Video.summary: A glimpse into the twisted and hilarious mind of surfer Sterling Spencer.
Video.title: Surf Madness!

Video.summary: L E N A documents the purpose and persistent journey of the first German female big wave surfer.
Video.title: LENA

Video.summary: Dive into the ultimate surf adventure with surfing legends riding epic waves in Hawaii, California, & Mexico.
Video.title: Surfing Is Art

Video.summary: Torren Martyn and Simon Jones craft Calypte, a board born from adventure and a decade-long bond.
Video.title: The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn

Image.alt: The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn
The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn
The Ugly Duckling with Simon Jones & Torren Martyn

Video.summary: Roam highlights the lifestyle of surfers who dedicate themselves to traveling and finding new, perfect waves.
Video.title: Roam

Video.summary: At 50, Twiggy Baker tests Axel Lorentz's boards in giant waves, chasing another world title.
Video.title: On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker

Image.alt: On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker
On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker
On Edge with Axel Lorentz & Grant 'Twiggy' Baker

Video.summary: Teen phenom Caroline Marks: pro at 13, now surging and set to represent her country.
Video.title: That's Caroline

Video.summary: Inside Kai Lenny’s life: from kiteboarding to big waves, he’s mastered every water sport.
Video.title: Paradigm Lost

Video.summary: Lady Killers follows top female surfers risking it all, featuring Moore, Marks, and Simmers in 4K action.
Video.title: Lady Killers

Video.summary: Is Frank Solomon a kind-hearted surfer or a hard-living bad boy? The man and myth may be inseparable.
Video.title: Let's Be Frank

Video.summary: Taylor and his surfer buddies think they have struck gold when he inherits a mansion by the beach.
Video.title: Ghost Babe

Video.summary: Sterling discovers what it takes to rise to the top and become one with the ocean.
Video.title: Gold

Video.summary: Morocco mixes waves, culture, and cuisine as Laura Coviella and Kauli Vaast explore its rise.
Video.title: Morocco

Video.summary: From Ocean Beach to Silicon Valley, meet San Francisco’s unique surf scene and legends.
Video.title: San Francisco

Video.summary: Meet wave-riding legends from soul-rich Durban to Cape Town.
Video.title: South Africa

Video.summary: Bourez and Vaast tour Tahiti, from Teahupo’o’s waves to its ocean-inspired lifestyle.
Video.title: Tahiti

Video.summary: Kai Lenny balances twin dad life and elite surfing, resetting goals for family and competition.
Video.title: 2023 Reset

Video.summary: Kai Lenny fields a team for Pipeline’s Backdoor Shootout, then tackles The Eddie at Waimea.
Video.title: Pipeline

Video.summary: Mid-season, Kai Lenny heads to Alaska for surf and heli-snow sessions with Travis Rice.
Video.title: Alaska

Video.summary: Shot on16mm film, Return To Zero explores the theme of life, death and reincarnation through a surfboard.
Video.title: Return to Zero

Video.summary: Blair Conklin is a three-time world skimboarding champion from Laguna Beach, and Skid Kids is his YouTube channel. This is the best of the Skid Kids.
Video.title: Blair Conklin: Best of Skid Kids

Image.alt: Blair Conklin: Best of Skid Kids
Blair Conklin: Best of Skid Kids

Video.summary: Singlefin Yellow tells the story of one surfboards life as it travels the globe shared by a group of friends.
Video.title: SingleFin: Yellow

Video.summary: Surfing filmmaker Jason Baffa explains the unexpected perils of getting your dream job.
Video.title: Jason Baffa's Surf Masterpieces

Video.summary: See professional surfers like Ben Bourgeois, Asher Nolan, The Hobgoods, Dean Morrison, Aaron Cormican, Gabe Kling, Jesse Hines, Matt Gilligan, and many more surfing in Australia, Hawaii, Indonesia, Costa Rica, South Africa, East Coast and California in truly epic conditions.
Video.title: Back to the Front

Video.summary: Ice Edge follows surfers shaping ice boards, battling nature in a poetic tribute to Lofoten.
Video.title: Ice Edge

Video.summary: Beyond the Green Veil unveils how logging shapes access as surfers and skiers rethink conservation.
Video.title: Beyond the Green Veil

Video.summary: Filip and Lukas Polach find purpose in Iceland’s wild beauty, chasing slopes and icy waves.
Video.title: Between Fjords

Video.summary: Jamie O’Brien and Poopies rise early to river surf, hit powder, then chase barrels by kayak.
Video.title: River Surf

Video.summary: North Shore risks: surf, kayak, and tubing; Wompers return—will tweaks mean fewer wipeouts?
Video.title: North Shore

Video.summary: In Waco, the crew tests a new wave machine and rides Texas barrels, plus waterslide antics.
Video.title: Waco

Video.summary: Still in Waco: wave-pool barrels, cable-park jumps with wompers and skis, then barefooting.
Video.title: From the Waves to the Sky

Image.alt: From the Waves to the Sky
From the Waves to the Sky
From the Waves to the Sky

Video.summary: On Maui, they try acid drops and freshwater surf, then buy a kayak to run a 50 ft waterfall.
Video.title: Bungee-Jumping Mayhem

Video.summary: Still on Maui: boards and kayaks score, then Poopies rides an epic sand hill by kayak.
Video.title: Boards and Kayaks

Video.summary: From Maui to Teahupo’o, Tahiti: straight to waves despite rain, then more mountain slides.
Video.title: From Maui to Teahupo’o

Video.summary: In Teahupo’o, Jamie tests Poopies’s waterskis; Poopies hunts barrels and pays the price.
Video.title: From White Water to Big Waves

Image.alt: From White Water to Big Waves
From White Water to Big Waves
From White Water to Big Waves
